title: Complete yogurt maker appliance
abstract: A yogurt maker device comprises an outer shell to house a yogurt vessel that receives milk and a culture container that receives yogurt culture. A processor within the outer shell controls a heating element to boil milk within the yogurt vessel using a temperature sensor as feedback and for maintaining a predefined boiling temperature for a predefined period of boiling time and a stirring device to continuously stir boiling milk within the yogurt vessel while boiling and also while cooling to a cooling predefined temperature until fermentation temperature is reached. The processor also controls a culture container base holding the culture container and having a motor to automatically pour the yogurt culture when the fermentation temperature is reached. Finally, a cooling mechanism automatically provides cooling to contents of the yogurt vessel once fermentation is complete.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  We claim: 1. A yogurt making device to autonomously prepare yogurt from ingredients, the yogurt making device comprising: an outer shell to house a yogurt vessel that receives milk and house a yogurt culture container that receives yogurt culture; a lid assembly attached to the outer shell to cover the yogurt vessel ; an input/ output element accessible from the outer shell, the input/ output device to receive a selection of recipe parameters; a processor within or attached to the outer shell; a heating element, attached within the outer shell and communicatively coupled to the processor, to boil milk within the yogurt vessel using a temperature sensor as feedback and for maintaining a predefined boiling temperature for a predefined period of boiling time; a stirring element, attached within the outer shell and communicatively coupled to the processor, to continuously stir boiling milk within the yogurt vessel while boiling, and also continuously stirring 

 the milk while cooling to a predefined fermentation temperature ; a culture container base attached within the outer shell and holding the yogurt culture container and having a motor communicatively coupled to the processor, to automatically pour the yogurt culture when the fermentation temperature is reached; and a cooling element, attached within the outer shell and coupled to the processor, to automatically provide cooling to contents of the yogurt vessel once fermentation is complete. 2. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the lid assembly covers the yogurt culture container in a manner that insulates yogurt culture while milk is boiling, prior to the yogurt culture being poured into the yogurt vessel . 3. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the culture container is automatically tipped to pour the yogurt culture, wherein in response to the culture container tipping, the lid assembly covers the yogurt vessel in a manner that seals a fermentation process. 4. The yogurt making device of claim 1, further comprising : a power management integrated circuit (PMIC) module to manage access to a primary electrical power of the yogurt making device, including management of overlapping requests from the heating element, the stirring element, and the cooling element. 5. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the boiling temperature for boiling milk is received as a recipe parameter of the selected recipe parameters. 6. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the temperature for fermentation is received as a recipe parameter of the selected recipe parameters. 7. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the predefined refrigeration temperature for completed yogurt is approximately 40 degrees Fahrenheit. 8. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the cooling mechanism comprises a Peltier module, an inner heat-sink, an outer heat-sink and an exhaust fan. 9. The yogurt making device of claim 1, which automatically produces ready to consume yogurt from ingredients . 10. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein a top lid flap and a top lid base of a lid assembly, and the yogurt culture container are all removable for cleaning after exposure to milk fumes. 11. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein a motor/ solenoid powers dispersion of yogurt culture from the yogurt culture base. 12. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the yogurt culture vessel is composed for boiling milk, for fermenting yogurt and for storage in a refrigerator. 13. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein a base of the yogurt vessel is curved to accommodate a stirring mechanism affixed to a flat bottom surface of the yogurt making device. 14. The yogurt making device of claim 1, wherein the recipe parameters include a setting for thick consistency yogurt processed with an extended boiling time.
